---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
labels: type:feature
---

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the problem you're trying to solve, not the solution.
     "I want X" is less useful than "When I'm doing Y, I can't Z." -->



## Proposed solution

<!-- How would you like it to work? Be as specific or as vague as makes sense. -->



## Alternatives you've considered

<!-- Any other approaches you've thought about? Why did you reject them? -->



## Is this in the roadmap?

<!-- Check ROADMAP.md. If it's already listed, link to the relevant section.
     If it's not listed, that's fine — new ideas are welcome. -->
